exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your life transitions forward
items: Create a comprehensive inventory of your current life situation across all major areas
Research and compile a list of 5-7 people who have successfully navigated similar life transitions
Schedule and complete a skills assessment to identify your transferable abilities and knowledge gaps
Create a detailed timeline mapping out the key milestones and deadlines for your transition
Identify and document your core values and non-negotiables through a structured values assessment exercise
Build a comprehensive support network by identifying and connecting with 3-5 key people who can provide different types of assistance during your transition
